page.title: fibromyalgia — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for fibromyalgia: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for fibromyalgia: 107 alterations and 462 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

natural_products.name: SAMe (S-adenosylmethionine)
natural_products.key_findings: Sam-e improves symptoms in primary fibromyalgia.; Patients with fibromyalgia appear to have low levels of zinc and magnesium correlating with tender points and fatigue, respectively.; Coenzyme Q10 may be of benefit in patients with fibromyalgia.

disclaimer: Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
